message:
refactor(persist): optimize RDB sorting and enforce stream group count

- Change encode_rdb to use references instead of cloning entries when
  sorting, reducing memory allocation for large datasets
- Remove backwards-compat code path for streams without consumer group
  count - group count is now always expected in stream encoding
- Add rdb_stream_decode_rejects_missing_group_count test to verify
  truncated stream payloads are rejected
- Simplify bounds checking in pending entry decoding with two 16-byte
  checks instead of one 40-byte check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
